title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.19 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD holding above 1.1711, with ECB rate at 2% and Fed rate at 3.75%; rate divergence may weigh on EUR/USD.

title: CFTC — EUR
text: EUR net long position at 77.3% (lev_net=+1,029); watch for potential long squeeze.

title: Risk Regime
text: VIX at 19.2 signals normal volatility — not a risk-on environment.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD trading below 0.7072, with RBA hiking rates; AUD carry supported, but growth concerns may dominate.
